title: The Hunted
description: The Hunted Modpack brings an immersive horror experience to Minecraft.
body: **The Hunted Modpack** brings an immersive **horror experience** to Minecraft. With an expanded variety of **food**, new **tools**, and **armor**, you'll also face deadly new **mobs**. Survival becomes even more challenging with a **body part health** system, alongside **thirst**, and **temperature management**. Traditional healing is removed—**nutrition** and smart eating are key. Optimized for performance thanks to **Fabric**, you’ll experience smooth gameplay. Plus, prepare for a more intense challenge with **random respawns** spanning up to **2000 blocks** away!
